label: Users
description: People who use a completed app, automation, report, agent, or platform experience.

label: Contributors
description: People looking for projects where they can open issues, contribute fixes, or improve samples.

label: Maintainers
description: Project maintainers and repository owners responsible for triage, releases, and governance.

label: Makers
description: Low-code makers creating apps, flows, pages, copilots, or business solutions.

label: Developers
description: Professional developers extending Power Platform with code, SDKs, APIs, ALM, or automation.

label: Admins
description: Tenant, environment, platform, or solution administrators responsible for operations and governance.
